sentences.target: Mein Bruder kocht wie ein Profi.

translations.de: Mein Bruder kocht wie ein Profi.
translations.en: My brother cooks like a pro.
translations.es: Mi hermano cocina como un profesional.
translations.fr: Mon frère cuisine comme un pro.
translations.it: Mio fratello cucina come un professionista.
translations.pt: Meu irmão cozinha como um profissional.
translations.tr: Kardeşim bir profesyonel gibi yemek yapıyor.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi nấu ăn như một người chuyên nghiệp.
translations.nl: Mijn broer kookt als een professional.
translations.hu: A bátyám úgy főz, mint egy profi.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई पेशेवर की तरह खाना बनाता है।
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου μαγειρεύει σαν επαγγελματίας.
translations.nb: Broren min lager mat som en proff.
translations.id: Kakak saya memasak seperti seorang profesional.
translations.sv: Min bror lagar mat som ett proffs.
translations.ro: Fratele meu gătește ca un profesionist.
translations.da: Min bror laver mad som en professionel.
translations.ja: 兄はプロみたいに料理する。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'Bruder' to mark ownership (1st person singular).
Head noun of the subject noun phrase.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present) expressing the action of the subject.
Comparative subordinator introducing a manner comparison phrase ('wie ein Profi') modifying the verb.
Indefinite article functioning as determiner within the comparison noun phrase.
Noun within the comparison phrase ('wie ein Profi') indicating manner.

sentences.target: Ich spiele heute gegen einen Profi.

translations.de: Ich spiele heute gegen einen Profi.
translations.en: I’m playing against a pro today.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je joue contre un pro.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我和职业选手比赛。
translations.yue: 我今日同職業選手比賽。
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi thi đấu với một người chuyên nghiệp.
translations.nl: Vandaag speel ik tegen een prof.
translations.hi: आज मैं एक पेशेवर के खिलाफ खेल रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Σήμερα παίζω απέναντι σε έναν επαγγελματία.
translations.nb: I dag spiller jeg mot en proff.
translations.id: Hari ini saya bermain melawan seorang profesional.
translations.sv: I dag spelar jag mot ett proffs.
translations.da: I dag spiller jeg mod en professionel.
translations.ja: 今日はプロと対戦する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (1st person singular).
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition heading a prepositional phrase that specifies the opponent.
Indefinite article functioning as determiner of the object noun within the prepositional phrase.
Noun serving as the object of the preposition 'gegen' (the opponent).

translations.vi: Thợ làm tóc là một người chuyên nghiệp.

tokens.explanation: Definite article functioning as determiner of the subject noun.
Head noun of the subject noun phrase.
Copular verb (3rd person singular, present) linking subject and predicate nominal.
Indefinite article functioning as determiner of the predicate noun.
Predicate noun (predicate nominal) complement of 'ist'.

sentences.target: Sie fotografiert schon fast wie ein Profi.
sentences.reading: /ziː foːtoɡʁaˈfiːɐ̯t ʃoːn fast viː aɪ̯n ˈpʁoːfi./

translations.de: Sie fotografiert schon fast wie ein Profi.
translations.ipa: /ziː foːtoɡʁaˈfiːɐ̯t ʃoːn fast viː aɪ̯n ˈpʁoːfi./
translations.en: She already takes photos almost like a pro.
translations.es: Ya hace fotos casi como una profesional.
translations.fr: Elle prend déjà des photos presque comme une pro.
translations.it: Scatta già foto quasi come una professionista.
translations.zh-Hans: 她拍照已经快像专业人士了。
translations.yue: 佢影相已經差唔多好似專業人士咁。
translations.ru: Она уже фотографирует почти как профессионал.
translations.pt: Ela já fotografa quase como uma profissional.
translations.he: היא כבר מצלמת כמעט כמו מקצוענית.
translations.tr: Şimdiden neredeyse bir profesyonel gibi fotoğraf çekiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy chụp ảnh gần như một người chuyên nghiệp rồi.
translations.ar: هي تلتقط الصور بالفعل تقريبًا مثل محترفة.
translations.nl: Ze fotografeert al bijna als een professional.
translations.uk: Вона вже фотографує майже як професіонал.
translations.hi: वह पहले से ही लगभग एक पेशेवर की तरह तस्वीरें लेती है।
translations.pl: Ona już robi zdjęcia prawie jak profesjonalistka.
translations.nb: Hun fotograferer allerede nesten som en proff.
translations.id: Dia sudah memotret hampir seperti seorang profesional.
translations.sv: Hon fotograferar redan nästan som ett proffs.
translations.ro: Ea fotografiază deja aproape ca o profesionistă.
translations.da: Hun tager allerede billeder næsten som en professionel.
translations.fi: Hän kuvaa jo melkein kuin ammattilainen.
translations.ja: 彼女はもうほとんどプロみたいに写真を撮る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (3rd person singular).
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present).
Degree/manner adverb modifying the verb, often used with 'fast' for nuance.
Degree adverb modifying the manner of the action; combines with 'schon'.
Comparative subordinator introducing the comparison phrase.
Indefinite article functioning as determiner within the comparison noun phrase.
Noun within the comparison phrase ('wie ein Profi') indicating manner.
